description: Given an integer N, count the number of set bits (1s) in its binary representation.
starter_code_bugs: Wrong increment method (using count = count + 1 instead of count += 1)

test_cases.explanation: Number 1 has binary representation '1' with 1 set bit
Number 2 has binary representation '10' with 1 set bit
Number 3 has binary representation '11' with 2 set bits
Number 4 has binary representation '100' with 1 set bit
Number 5 has binary representation '101' with 2 set bits
Number 6 has binary representation '110' with 2 set bits
Number 7 has binary representation '111' with 3 set bits
Number 8 has binary representation '1000' with 1 set bit
Number 9 has binary representation '1001' with 2 set bits
Number 10 has binary representation '1010' with 2 set bits
